svg.text: ClawDesk — Complete Request → Response Lineage (Tauri Desktop)
All entry points • OAuth/Auth • 17 Channels • 52 Skills • Extensions • Multi-Agent • 7 Persistence Stores
SECURITY & AUTH — Scan • Identity • OAuth • Vault • Profile Rotation
AGENT & MODEL — 40 Templates • 10 Providers • LinUCB Routing • Negotiator
🔌 10 Providers: Anthropic OpenAI Gemini Azure Bedrock
Cohere Ollama Local OpenRouter Copilot + compatible
HISTORY & CONTEXT — SochDB ACID • LRU • Context Guard (4-level compaction)
Dual-write • compare both → use larger (collision fix)
80% threshold • adaptive thresholds • circuit breaker (3 failures, 60s cooldown)
PROMPT PIPELINE — Memory Recall • 52 Skills (knapsack) • PromptBuilder • Team Roster • Cache
TOOLS & EXTENSIONS — 15+ Tools • Plugin Hooks (14 phases) • MCP Bridge • Browser CDP
🔌 Plugin Host: 14 Hooks (Boot→BeforeAgent→BeforeTool→AfterTool→PostTurn→Shutdown) • Sandbox CAS • RAII guards
📦 52 Bundled Skills (include_dir!) • openclaw adapter (SKILL.md) • trigger eval • env injection • hot-reload (ArcSwap)
LLM AGENTIC LOOP — run_with_failover() • max 25 rounds • parallel tool execution
🔄 Agentic Loop (shared by all entry paths)
① provider.stream() → StreamChunk → real-time UI events
② Parse tool_calls (Qwen/DeepSeek recovery for malformed JSON)
③ Execute tools in parallel (JoinSet) → results back to LLM
④ Loop until stop | max_rounds=25 | cancel token
L2: Rotate auth profile (weighted RR, exponential)
Empty response: 3×2s retry • Context overflow: adaptive compaction
MULTI-AGENT & CROSS-CHANNEL — message_send • spawn_subagent • ask_human fan-out • A2A
Fast-path: "say X to discord" → O(1) direct send
Channel origins persisted for reply routing
Parallel delegation via JoinSet • depth limit 5
Router agent synthesizes results from specialists
PERSISTENCE — 7 Stores: SochDB • LRU • SemanticCache • KnowledgeGraph • Memory • Audit • Origins
